name: Vague brief — tests clarification behavior
expectedBehaviors: Rates brief clarity below 5 and asks clarifying questions
Does NOT immediately start planning — asks what the user DOES on settings
Asks about scope: account settings? app settings? admin settings?
Does not assume desktop — asks or defaults with escape hatch
antiPatterns: Immediately outputs a plan without clarifying
Produces a generic settings page with sidebar + form without asking what settings
Asks more than 3 questions before doing any work

evaluationCriteria.clarificationQuality: Does it ask WHAT the user does on settings, not just what it looks like?
evaluationCriteria.questionEconomy: Does it ask 1-2 focused questions, not a survey?
evaluationCriteria.designThinking: Does it think about the user's job before layout?
